'''Skeeter''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] of an unknown flying [[Species/Legends|species]] who served as an assistant to [[Princess/Legends|Princess]] [[Lourdes]]. He had six [[Limb/Legends|limbs]] and resembled a giant fly. During the duel between the Princess and [[Lord/Legends|Lord]] [[Gar-Oth]], Skeeter held guns to the heads of Gar-Oth's guards to prevent them from interfering. This gave Princess Lourdes the opportunity to kill Gar-Oth.
